# logs-mcp

The `read_logs` MCP tool — agents read persisted log channels (`clientLog()` /
`Log.channel({persist:true})`) for any worktree. The non-SQL sibling of `query_db`.
Lives in its own plugin (not `logs`) so the logging primitive stays free of a
`tasks-core` dependency: `attachments` depends on `logs`, and `tasks-core` depends on
`attachments`, so `logs` importing `tasks-core` would form a cycle. See
[`../logs/CLAUDE.md`](../logs/CLAUDE.md) for the file convention and read paths.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: MCP tool for agents to read persisted browser/server log channels for a worktree.
- Server:
  - Uses: `tasks-core.getConversation`
  - Register: `mcpTool('read_logs')`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
